# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing all static
contributions aggregated across plugins, with slot, id, and plugin columns.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin contributions table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Contributions"
